scripts.build: test -f ./src/generated/src/models/index.ts || (echo 'Missing generated API client. Run `bun run --cwd packages/api-client codegen` locally and commit `packages/api-client/src/generated`.' && exit 1)
scripts.generate: bun x @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i ../../apps/api/openapi.json -g typescript-fetch -o ./src/generated --skip-validate-spec --additional-properties=typescriptThreePlus=true,supportsES6=true,npmName=@workspace/api-client,npmVersion=0.0.1 && bun run fix
scripts.test:e2e: echo 'No e2e tests configured for api-client'
